title: senna ligustrina
intro: Senna ligustrina, also known as the wild senna or Cassia marilandica, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a laxative due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna ligustrina include relief from constipation, digestive issues, and inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Senna ligustrina include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
